info.name: Help PR — Area, Franchise, Subscription
info.description:
Postman Collection v2.1 — **Area**, **Franchise** (CRUD + franchise-category + franchise-service mapping), **Subscription plan**, **Partner document**, **Partner service**, **Partner subscription**, **Tax**, **Employee**, **Export**, etc.

**Environment:** Set `base_url`, `auth_token`, and ids (see Collection Variables). Prefer a Postman Environment for secrets.

---
### Franchise & mapping — route manifest (matches `server.js`)

**`/api/franchise`**
- `POST /create` — Create
- `POST /imports` — Imports (`body.records` array)
- `GET /related-catalog/:franchise_id` — Related catalog
- `GET /get/:id` — Get by id (`{{id}}` = franchise _id)
- `GET /getAll`
- `GET /getDropDown`
- `PUT /update/:id`
- `DELETE /delete/:id`

**`/api/franchise-category`** (mapping collection)
- `POST /create`
- `GET /getAll` — query: `page`, `limit`, `franchise_id`, optional `is_active`, `is_request` (catalog filters)
- `GET /get/:id` — use **`{{franchise_category_mapping_id}}`**
- `PUT /update/:id` — toggles `active_categories`/`inactive_categories`, optional `categories_order`; full list replace via `categories_list`

**`/api/franchise-service`** (mapping collection)
- `POST /create`
- `GET /getAll` — same query shape
- `GET /get/:id` — use **`{{franchise_service_mapping_id}}`**
- `PUT /update/:id` — toggles `active_services`/`inactive_services`, optional `services_order`

**`/api/partner_service`**
- **Backoffice:** `POST /create`, `GET /getAll`, `GET /getDropDown`, `POST /updateStatus/:id`, `DELETE /delete/:id`
- **Partner JWT:** `GET /myServices`, `GET /availableServices`, `GET /availableFranchiseCategories`, `GET /availableFranchiseServices`, `POST /addMyServices`, `PUT /updateMyService/:id`, `POST /toggleMyServiceStatus/:id`

Folder **Franchise** documents the mapping toggle/cascade behavior in request descriptions.

variable.description: API root with protocol, no trailing slash (e.g. http://localhost:5001).
JWT / bearer token from /api/auth/userLogin or /api/auth/login. Prefer storing only in an Environment as type secret.
Generic MongoDB _id: franchise GET/update/delete, subscription-plan, imports, etc. For mapping docs prefer franchise_category_mapping_id / franchise_service_mapping_id.
`franchise_category` collection document _id (from getAll). Used in /api/franchise-category/get/:id and .../update/:id.
`franchise_service` collection document _id (from getAll). Used in /api/franchise-service/get/:id and .../update/:id.
State document _id (for request bodies linking to state).
Franchise document _id. Used in franchise create side-effects, franchise-category / franchise-service bodies, GET /api/franchise/related-catalog/{{franchise_id}}, and getAll query filters.
Admin user _id (audit / created_by fields if applicable).

request.description: POST /api/user/create — requires Bearer token. Super Admin (5) and Staff (6) may create any user type. Admin (1) and Employee (3) may create only Partner, Employee, and User; partner/employee `franchise_id` is forced to the caller's franchise. Partner and User cannot call this route. Send a single `password` (strength rules apply).
POST /api/user/changePassword. Supported `type` values: 2 (partner) or 4 (user). Send `new_password` only; `confirm_password` is not used by the API.
PUT /api/user/update/:id. If you send `password`, use a single field only; `confirm_password` is not used by the API.

item.name: Franchise
item.description:
Franchise CRUD plus **franchise-category** / **franchise-service** mapping APIs.

**Create franchise:** Inserts mapping rows: `categories_list` / `services_list` (assigned ids only), `active_*` / empty `inactive_*`, **`categories_order`** / **`services_order`** (payload order).

**Toggle on/off:** Use mapping `PUT .../update` with **`active_categories`/`inactive_categories`** or **`active_services`/`inactive_services`** only — those arrays persist; **`categories_list` / `services_list` are not rewritten** on toggle (only when the full list is replaced). Responses **hydrate** list `is_active` from `active_*` for display.

**Cascade:** Inactive **category** ⇒ related **services** (same franchise) are moved to **`inactive_services`** automatically.

**Partners:** `availableFranchiseCategories` / `availableFranchiseServices` use **`franchise.categories` ∩ `active_categories`** and **`franchise.services` ∩ `active_services`**, and hide services whose category is inactive.

**Dropdown (`GET /api/franchise/getDropDown`):** Subfolder **Dropdown**. Default request = franchises **not** already assigned to another admin (Super Admin / Staff). **`full_list=true`** = all active franchises for franchise admin / employee / super admin / staff. Bearer **`{{auth_token}}`** required.

**Global catalog request queue (per franchise):** Subfolder **Global catalog — requested (franchise queue)** calls **`GET /api/category/getAll`** and **`GET /api/service/getAll`** on the global catalogue. Pending proposals come from **`POST /api/category/create-request`** / **`POST /api/service/create-request`**. For **Franchise Admin** (`user.type` = 1 **and** `user.franchise_id` set), the server filters to rows whose **`requested_by`** belongs to a user with the **same `franchise_id`** as the caller — no `franchise_id` query param; use a franchise-admin **`{{auth_token}}`** aligned with **`{{franchise_id}}`**. Super Admin / Staff are not scoped this way. Use query **`is_request=true`**; add **`approval_status=pending`** for the approval queue only.

item.name: Create
item.description: Super admin / staff. Required: `name`, `state_id`, `city_id`, `area_id` (array), `admin_id`, `categories`, `services`, `is_active`. Creates mapping rows (see folder description). **Partners** see intersection with mapping `active_*` after toggles.

item.name: Related catalog
item.description:
**GET** `/api/franchise/related-catalog/:franchise_id`

**Who can call:** Super admin (5), Staff (6), or Admin (1) / Employee (3) whose `franchise_id` **equals** the path `franchise_id`. Others **403**; bad id **400**.

**Bearer:** `{{auth_token}}`, `{{franchise_id}}`.

**Response `record`:** `franchise`; raw **`franchise_categories`** / **`franchise_services`** (each has `categories_list`/`services_list`, **`active_*` / `inactive_*`**, **`categories_order`** / **`services_order`**). Filtered **`categories`** / **`services`** use **`active_*`** arrays for effective on/off (not toggled list subdocs). **`partners`** (`active_services_providing`), **`employees`**, **`customers`** (type 4 only: users with at least one non-deleted **`address`** row whose trimmed **`pincode`** is in the union of **`pincodes`** on the franchise's linked **`area`** documents; not all global users). Each customer includes **`addresses`**: all non-deleted **`address`** documents for that user (same fields as user getAll), sorted by **`created_at`** ascending.

item.name: Dropdown
item.description:
**GET** `/api/franchise/getDropDown` — returns `records`: `{ _id, name }[]` for **active** franchises (`deleted_at` null). **Bearer** `{{auth_token}}` required (**401** if missing/invalid).

**Default (no `full_list`):** **Super Admin (5)** or **Staff (6)** only (**403** otherwise). Omits franchises already linked to another **admin** (`user.type` 1 with `franchise_id`). Optional **`for_user_id`** / **`forUserId`**: when editing that admin user, their current franchise remains in the list.

**`full_list=true`** or **`full_list=1`** (camelCase **`fullList`**): **Super Admin**, **Staff**, **Franchise Admin** (type 1 + `franchise_id`), or **Franchise Employee** (type 3 + `franchise_id`). Returns **all** active franchises (no admin-assignment exclusion).

item.name: Assignable franchises (super admin / staff)
item.description: Pick a franchise for an admin who does not have one yet. **Super Admin or Staff** JWT. Franchises assigned to another admin are omitted.

item.name: Assignable — editing existing admin
item.description: Same as assignable list, but pass **`for_user_id`** so this admin’s current franchise is **not** treated as held by “another” admin. Set **`{{admin_id}}`** to the franchise-admin user being edited.

item.name: Full list (filters / franchise backoffice)
item.description: **`full_list=true`** — all active franchises. **Super Admin**, **Staff**, **Franchise Admin**, or **Franchise Employee** token (see folder description). Use for filters and screens that need every franchise, not only unassigned ones.

item.name: Update
item.description: PUT /api/franchise/update/:id. Updates the **franchise** document (e.g. `categories`, `services` arrays on the franchise). **Does not** rewrite `franchise_category` / `franchise_service` mapping rows — use those APIs for toggles. After changing franchise `categories`/`services`, keep mapping docs in sync manually or via super-admin mapping create/update. **Partner** availability intersects franchise lists with mapping **`active_*`**.

item.name: Franchise category — create
item.description: POST /api/franchise-category/create — super admin / staff only. Body: `franchise_id`, `categories_list` (`category_id`, `is_active`). Server sets `active_categories` / `inactive_categories` and **`categories_order`** (same order as entries in `categories_list`).

item.name: Franchise category — getAll
item.description: GET /api/franchise-category/getAll — super / staff / franchise admin / employee. Query: `franchise_id`, `page`, `limit`, optional `is_active` / `is_request` (catalog doc filters). Each record: `active_categories`, `inactive_categories`, `categories_order`, plus **hydrated** `categories_list` for API display.

item.name: Franchise category — get by id
item.description: GET /api/franchise-category/get/:id — super / staff / franchise admin / employee (scoped). Response record includes `active_categories`, `inactive_categories`, `categories_order`, and **hydrated** `categories_list[].is_active` from `active_categories`.

item.name: Franchise category — update
item.description:
PUT /api/franchise-category/update/:id.

**A — Partition toggle (default):** Body with **`active_categories`** and/or **`inactive_categories`** (ObjectId string arrays). They must **partition** every `category_id` in `categories_list`. **`categories_list` is not persisted** from this toggle. **Cascade:** any category moved to **inactive** forces services under that category (same franchise) from **`active_services`** → **`inactive_services`** on the mapping doc.

**B — Replace full list:** Super admin (or franchise admin under rules) may send **`categories_list`** — then `active_*` / `inactive_*` / **`categories_order`** are rebuilt from the payload.

**C — Reorder only:** **`categories_order`** alone (permutation of mapped ids). Responses hydrate `categories_list[].is_active` from `active_categories`.

item.name: Franchise service — create
item.description: POST /api/franchise-service/create — super admin / staff only. Body: `franchise_id`, `services_list` (`service_id`, `is_active`). Server sets `active_services` / `inactive_services` and **`services_order`** (same order as `services_list` entries).

item.name: Franchise service — getAll
item.description: GET /api/franchise-service/getAll — same roles as franchise category. Records include `active_services`, `inactive_services`, `services_order`, **hydrated** `services_list`.

item.name: Franchise service — get by id
item.description: GET /api/franchise-service/get/:id — same auth as getAll. Response hydrates `services_list[].is_active` from `active_services`.

item.name: Franchise service — update
item.description:
PUT /api/franchise-service/update/:id.

**Partition toggle:** `active_services` / `inactive_services` only — **`services_list` not persisted** from toggle (only when the full list is replaced). Send one or both arrays; complement derived. **No** parent-category cascade on service toggle.

**Reorder:** optional **`services_order`**. Responses hydrate `services_list[].is_active` from `active_services`.

item.name: Global catalog — requested (franchise queue)
item.description:
Lists **global** `category` / `service` documents that were submitted as requests (`is_request`, `approval_status`). These are **not** `franchise_category` / `franchise_service` mapping rows.

**Auth:** Prefer **Franchise Admin** JWT (`type` 1, `franchise_id` on user). Server applies **`requested_by` ∈ users where `franchise_id` matches the caller’s franchise**.

**Query:** `is_request=true` (required for “requests only”). Optional `approval_status=pending` for items awaiting review. Pagination: `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `sort_by`.

**Submit new requests:** `POST /api/category/create-request`, `POST /api/service/create-request` (see Category / Service folders). **Approve/reject:** `PUT /api/category/update/:id` or `PUT /api/service/update/:id` with `approval_status` and rejection reason when rejecting.

request.description: Use **Franchise Admin** token tied to **`{{franchise_id}}`**. Returns pending global category requests submitted by users under that franchise. Remove `approval_status=pending` to include other approval states while keeping `is_request=true`.
Same scoping as requested categories: **Franchise Admin** token; **`requested_by`** must be a user of your franchise.

item.name: Category
item.description:
Global catalog `category` documents (not franchise mapping). Workflow: types 5/6 direct publish; types 1/3 pending (`is_request`). Super admin/staff approve/reject via update body. **getDropDown:** accepted catalog only.

**Create:** `POST /api/category/create` or **`POST /api/category/create-request`** (request path requires non-empty `service_ids`).

**Update — editable fields (same for normal vs request route unless noted):** `name`, `desc`, `description` (alias → `desc`), `image_url`, `service_ids` (writes `services` array), `city_ids`, `state_ids`, `is_active`, `is_request`, **`approval_status`** (`approve` | `pending` | `rejected`), **`rejection_reason`** (required when rejecting), **`is_rejected`** (alias → approval). Client cannot set **`requested_by`** (stripped).
- **`PUT /api/category/update/:id`** — Partial JSON OK; middleware rejects empty strings for any of `name`/`desc`/`image_url` **if** sent; if `service_ids` is sent it must be non-empty.
- **`PUT /api/category/update-request/:id`** — Same handler; **must** send **`name`**, **`desc`**, **`image_url`**, and non-empty **`service_ids`** every time (full resubmit).

**Multipart:** `multipart/form-data` with field `image` updates `image_url` via upload.

request.description: Token type 5 or 6.
Types 1 or 3 → pending.
Pending global category requests: query uses **is_request** and **approval_status** (not request_status).
Accepted / legacy only.

Partial update example. See folder description for full list (`service_ids`, `city_ids`, `state_ids`, `is_active`, `approval_status`, etc.). For resubmitting a **pending request** with all required fields use **`PUT /api/category/update-request/:id`**.
Backend field is **`approval_status`**: `approve` | `pending` | `rejected` (not `request_status`).
`rejection_reason` is required when **`approval_status`** is `rejected`.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Requested category",
  "desc": "Updated copy after review feedback",
  "image_url": "https://example.com/cat.jpg",
  "service_ids": ["{{service_id}}"],
  "city_ids": ["{{city_id}}"],
  "state_ids": ["{{state_id}}"],
  "is_active": false
}

request.description: PUT **`/api/category/update-request/:id`**. Same controller as **`/update`**; middleware requires **every** call to include **`name`**, **`desc`**, **`image_url`**, and a non-empty **`service_ids`** array (like **`POST /create-request`**). Optional: **`city_ids`**, **`state_ids`**, **`is_active`**, **`approval_status`**, etc. Multipart with field **`image`** also supported (same as category update).
Same rules as create; bulk Excel requires types 5 or 6.

item.name: Service
item.description:
Global catalog `service` documents (not franchise mapping). Super Admin (5) / Staff (6) create published services (`approval_status` **approve**, `is_request` false). Admin (1) / Employee (3) use **`POST /api/service/create-request`** for pending rows (`is_request` true). Super Admin / Staff approve/reject via **`approval_status`** on update (not `request_status`). **getDropDown** returns accepted catalog entries.

**Create:** `POST /api/service/create` or **`POST /api/service/create-request`**.

**Update — editable fields:** `name`, `desc`, `description` (→ `desc`), `image_url`, `category_id` or `category` (alias), `price`, `tax`, `commission`, `payment_type`, `minimum_deposit`, `city_ids`, `state_ids`, `is_active`, `is_request`, **`approval_status`** (`approve`|`pending`|`rejected`), **`rejection_reason`**, **`is_rejected`**. Client cannot set **`requested_by`** (stripped). Changing **`category_id`** updates parent **`Category.services`** arrays.
- **`PUT /api/service/update/:id`** — Partial updates OK per middleware when fields are present.
- **`PUT /api/service/update-request/:id`** — Same fields; middleware matches create-request rules; server forces **`is_request`** true before approval merge.

**Multipart:** `multipart/form-data` with `image` or `service_image` for `image_url`.

request.description: Use token for type 5 or 6. Creates accepted service immediately. Alternatively use multipart/form-data with file field `image` instead of image_url.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "New requested service",
  "desc": "Awaiting super admin approval",
  "price": 299,
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "city_ids": ["{{city_id}}"],
  "state_ids": ["{{state_id}}"],
  "image_url": "https://example.com/service.jpg",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Use token for type 1 or 3. Server sets request_status pending, is_request_mode true, is_active false until reviewed.
Pending global service requests: query **`is_request`** and **`approval_status`** (backend has no `request_status`).
Returns only accepted / legacy services (excludes pending requests).

Partial content update example. See folder description for full field list. Franchise users: align with app auth rules. Approvals use **`approval_status`**, not `request_status`. To resubmit pending edits under stricter validation use **`PUT /api/service/update-request/:id`**.
Use **`approval_status`**: `approve` (not `request_status` / accepted).
`rejection_reason` required when **`approval_status`** is `rejected`.

PUT **`/api/service/update-request/:id`**. Uses **`updateServiceRequestMiddleware`** (same required fields as **`POST /api/service/create-request`**): **`name`**, **`desc`**, **`image_url`**, **`category_id`**, **`tax`**, **`commission`**, **`payment_type`**, **`minimum_deposit`**. Server sets **`is_request`: true** before save (unless superseded by **`approval_status`** merge). Include **`price`** and location arrays as needed. Multipart: fields **`image`** or **`service_image`**.
Without `records` array: same workflow as POST /create by role. Bulk Excel array import requires Super Admin or Staff.
Super Admin/Staff: any service. Admin/Employee: only their own request-mode rows.

item.name: Partner service
item.description: Partner-authenticated routes. **Available franchise categories / services** intersect the franchise document with the latest mapping **`active_categories`** / **`active_services`** (and drop services in inactive categories). Use franchise mapping APIs to toggle availability.

request.description: GET `/api/partner_service/availableFranchiseCategories`. **Partner** token; franchise from JWT `franchise_id`. Returns categories that are on the franchise **and** in mapping **`active_categories`**, still active + approved in the global catalogue. Toggle categories via **Franchise category — update** (partition arrays).

GET `/api/partner_service/availableFranchiseServices`. **Partner** token; required **`category_id`** query. Lists services on the franchise in mapping **`active_services`**, category allowed and active in mapping, global catalogue active + approved, not already on the partner profile. Inactive parent category ⇒ services hidden (cascade + partner filter).

item.name: Upload files (multipart)
item.description: Bearer token required. Body: form-data, key files (type File). Up to 5 files per route.

item.name: Update files (multipart)
item.description: Bearer token required. Body: form-data, key files (type File).
